ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds or kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted into the league */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick_number" INTEGER /* The draft pick number of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs, Preseason) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the stats belong */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "two_points_made" INTEGER /* Two-point field goals made */,
  "two_points_attempted" INTEGER /* Two-point field goals attempted */,
  "two_point_percentage" REAL /* Two-point field goal percentage */,
  "three_points_made" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "three_points_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive efficiency rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover rate per 100 possessions */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Usage rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the playoffs */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the playoff (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "playoff_series" TEXT /* Name of the playoff series (e.g., First Round, Conference Finals) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the series */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won in the series */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost in the series */,
  "series_result" TEXT /* Result of the series (e.g., Won, Lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach works for */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "education" TEXT /* Coach's educational background */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams the coach has coached */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards and achievements of the coach */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic entry that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the statistic */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Insert, Delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_statistics ("stat_id")
)
